snapshots.notes: KTC scraped in SF+TEP mode (?sf=1&tep=1). Crowd values natively include both. Do NOT re-apply.

snapshots.scoring_context: dynasty SF TEP (IDPTradeCalc offense+IDP values via API+autocomplete)
snapshots.notes: IDPTradeCalc values. API returns IDP players (DL/LB/DB). Offensive players (QB/RB/WR/TE) are obtained via autocomplete search using the KTC player pool as the target list. Both offense and IDP values are exported to the CSV.
